---
title: "test_overfit_corrections_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_overfit_corrections_empire.py"
loc: 38
complexity: 6
logic_score: 4.65
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 1.78
---

## Intent
The `test_overfit_corrections_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on teardown_module, TestOverfitCorrectionsEmpire, test_overfit_logic, search_side_effect. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via teardown_module, TestOverfitCorrectionsEmpire, test_overfit_logic, search_side_effect. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.tools.data](file://src.tools.data)

### Exports
- `teardown_module`
- `TestOverfitCorrectionsEmpire`
- `test_overfit_logic`
- `search_side_effect`
